apis.name: @ohos.data.preferences (用户首选项)
apis.purpose: Key-Value轻量级数据持久化，支持number/string/boolean及其数组类型，提供get/put/delete/flush等操作

apis.name: @ohos.data.relationalStore (关系型数据库)
apis.purpose: 基于SQLite的关系型数据库，提供表创建、增删改查、SQL执行、事务管理等完整数据管理能力

apis.name: @ohos.data.sendableRelationalStore (共享关系型数据库)
apis.purpose: 为关系型数据库提供Sendable支持，实现ValuesBucket/Asset在taskpool并发线程间的跨线程传递（API 12+）

apis.name: @ohos.data.ValuesBucket (数据集)
apis.purpose: 定义数据集键值对类型ValueType和ValuesBucket，作为DataShare场景的数据插入集合（API 10+，仅Stage模型）

apis.name: @ohos.data.dataSharePredicates (数据共享谓词)
apis.purpose: 提供DataShare查询筛选条件的谓词，支持equalTo/and/or/like/between/orderByAsc/limit等数据库筛选操作（API 10+，仅Stage模型）

notableFindings: All five APIs import from @kit.ArkData but under different namespaces: preferences, relationalStore, sendableRelationalStore, dataSharePredicates, plus direct type imports for ValuesBucket

@ohos.data.ValuesBucket defines a base ValueType = number|string|boolean for DataShare, while relationalStore has a richer ValueType including Asset/Assets/Uint8Array/bigint — these are distinct types in different namespaces
preferences does NOT guarantee process concurrency safety; XML/GSKV storage modes added in API 18
sendableRelationalStore requires API 12+ and is specifically designed for taskpool multi-thread scenarios
dataSharePredicates serves as a backend-agnostic predicate; when used with RDB it effectively maps to RdbPredicates semantics
